MappingFields.Name: Type
MappingFields.Description:
string or null
A - active; I - inactive. Default to "A" (active). Permitted Values: {"A", "I"}.

MappingFields.Name: InactiveDate
MappingFields.Description: Required by disable Date staff/contact made inactive.

MappingFields.Name: OwnerType
MappingFields.Description:
Required by create
Enum: "Staff" "Contact" "Plugin" "Internal" "ApiClient"
Owner type. 0 - this person is a Staff, 1 - a Contact. Default to 0 (Staff).

MappingFields.Name: FirstName
MappingFields.Description: Given name of the person. Maximum characters allowed: 30. Default to empty string.

MappingFields.Name: Email
MappingFields.Description: Required: Contact email. Maximum characters allowed: 100. Used to login.

MappingFields.Name: UserName
MappingFields.Description: Login name, e.g. username. Maximum characters allowed: 50. Not used for contacts in Time, since they do not login. If not provided, server will generate a GUID.
